approach: Mirror the recently-merged SpecsFilterState pattern with a parallel SpecsSortState class that persists a sort-mode key to workspace state and fires an onChange to refresh the tree.
last_action: All 10 tasks complete; 346/346 tests passing; ready to commit

specify.key_finding: SpecsFilterState + fuzzyMatch pattern (recently merged PR #121) is the template: workspace-state key, onChange callback to trigger provider refresh, title-bar command + icon, sort applied after filter in specExplorerProvider.getChildren

plan.approach_summary: Mirror the recently-merged SpecsFilterState pattern with a parallel SpecsSortState class that persists a sort-mode key to workspace state and fires an onChange to refresh the tree.
risks: Status sort depends on .spec-context.json.currentStep; specs that predate the context file would all tie and sort by fallback. Mitigated by the numeric-prefix tie-break so output stays deterministic.
Date sort uses fs.statSync birthtime/mtime, which git operations can rewrite. Documented as a caveat; number remains default.

T002.did: Created SortMode union, DEFAULT_SORT_MODE, and comparators map; added injectable StatFn for testability
concerns: Added StatFn dependency injection to ComparatorContext — diverges slightly from the plan but is required because fs.statSync isn't spyable in this Jest setup

T003.did: Created SpecsSortState mirroring SpecsFilterState with mode coercion

T004.did: 7 tests for SpecsSortState covering default, persistence, set-to-default, clear, coerce, initialize

T005.did: 10 comparator tests — numeric/name/status/date modes + tie-breaks + injected stat failures

T006.did: Replaced inline sortSpecs with comparator dispatch; added statusByPath to existing spec-context loop; updated 2 existing provider tests for new default
concerns: Behavior change: non-numeric specs no longer fall back to birthtime under default sort — they now tie-break alphabetically. Users wanting birthtime must pick Date Created explicitly. Documented in README.

T007.did: Registered speckit.specs.sort QuickPick with 5 modes, current-mode checkmark, and conditional Reset option

T008.did: Wired SpecsSortState through extension.ts + updated specCommands.length assertion

T009.did: Added speckit.specs.sort command + view/title menu entry with $(sort-precedence) icon

T010.did: Added Sort specs section in README; reworded Active group bullet to reflect new default sort

concerns.note: Added StatFn dependency injection because fs.statSync cannot be spied on in this Jest setup. Default behavior unchanged in production.
Behavior change: default sort no longer uses birthtime fallback for non-numeric specs. Users pick Date Created mode instead. Documented in README and reflected in updated tests.

decisions: Sort logic extracted to specsSortMode.ts as pure functions so tests don't depend on VS Code API.
setMode('number') treated as clear() to simplify sort-active tracking (only non-default modes persist).
